event: Interior of a Gothic cathedral with the Pilgram Pulpit
description: A dark, atmospheric painting of the interior of a Gothic cathedral, likely St. Stephen's in Vienna. Towering stone columns and pointed arches recede into deep shadow. At left, an elaborate Gothic stone pulpit rises with intricate carved tracery and sculptural figures. The interior is very dark with selective illumination — a warm glow emanates from behind the pulpit structure, and a small solitary figure stands at the far end near a lit area. The dramatic chiaroscuro creates a sense of immense, mysterious sacred space.
